notes: requires_digest present every run (checked by verdict.sh — missing digest is a hard FAIL)
zero leaks (all real changes claimed in digest.files_touched)
copilot invocation must log --deny-tool=write --deny-tool=shell (read-only proof-of-concept tier)
drift_check PASS every run (cross-phase consistency verified)
copilot still read-only at this tier (write capability not yet granted)
taste_checkpoint PASS every run (visual regression confirmed between phases touching rendered output)
write capability granted for the first time at tier 2 (staged diff only; never committed by automation)
staged-diff-only output enforced (output_format: git_diff_only in frontmatter)
zero unread-acceptance incidents (every PASS run requires human_ack_ts in tiers.jsonl newer than the run, logged before the next run starts)
human_ack is the one friction point that survives to tier 4 by design — goal is invisible machinery, not removing Jed from decisions
